entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The host plant Arachis hypogaea L from which the virus was isolated

entities.name: PEANUT YELLOW SPOT VIRUS
entities.description: A virus that induces yellow leaf spots on peanut and belongs to the tomato spotted wilt virus group

entities.name: YELLOW LEAF SPOTS
entities.description: Necrotic leaf spots induced by PYSV on peanut

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the virus was isolated

entities.name: CHENOPODIACEAE
entities.description: A plant family to which PYSV was sap-transmissible

entities.name: CUPRESSACEAE
entities.description: A plant family to which PYSV was sap-transmissible

entities.name: SOLANACEAE
entities.description: A plant family to which PYSV was sap-transmissible

entities.name: LOCAL LESIONS
entities.description: Symptom induced by PYSV in various host plants

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental factor between 20 and 30 degrees Celsius required for systemic infection

entities.name: MEMBRANE-BOUND PARTICLES
entities.description: Spherical virus particles 10 to 100 nm in diameter observed in peanut leaves

entities.name: POLYPEPTIDES
entities.description: Protein components of the purified virus preparations

entities.name: NANIDET P 40
entities.description: Chemical treatment used to remove polypeptides from virus particles

entities.name: ELISA
entities.description: Enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay used for virus detection and analysis

entities.name: WESTERN BLOT
entities.description: Analytical technique used to detect specific proteins in the virus

entities.name: TOMATO SPOTTED WILT VIRUS GROUP
entities.description: The taxonomic group to which PYSV is assigned

entities.name: TOMATO SPOTTED WILT VIRUS
entities.description: Virus used for antisera comparison with PYSV
